title: Sikkim PSC – Veterinary Officer – 47 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Sikkim PSC Veterinary Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 47 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sikkim Public Service Commission (Sikkim PSC) Recruitment 2026 for 47 posts of Veterinary Officer. Candidates with BVSC Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 30-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Sikkim PSC official website spsc.sikkim.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry Science from a recognized University, Should have knowledge of any of the State Languages, Should be conversant with the customs and usages of Sikkim

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Sikkim PSC Veterinary Officer Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Sikkim Public Service Commission Veterinary Officer Recruitment 2026
